name: ecc-codex
description: Codex-optimized port of Everything Claude Code. Adds research-first, quality-gated, memory-aware operating skills for repo-local Codex work.

author.name: local Codex port inspired by affaan-m/everything-claude-code

interface.shortDescription: Use ECC-style operating loops in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Ports the high-value parts of Everything Claude Code into Codex-native operating skills: research-first planning, quality gates, lightweight memory capture, and Codex-oriented orchestration.
